item.title: March Premium Bonds jackpot winners revealed – did you win £1 million?
item.description: Over two million historic Premium Bonds prizes are still waiting to be claimed, according to NS&I

item.title: Three Indian stocks poised to profit
item.description: Indian stocks are making waves. Here, professional investor Gaurav Narain of the India Capital Growth Fund highlights three of his favourites

item.title: UK small-cap stocks ‘are ready to run’
item.description: UK small-cap stocks could be set for a multi-year bull market, with recent strong performance outstripping the large-cap indices

item.title: Hints of a private credit crisis rattle investors
item.description: There are similarities to 2007 in private credit. Investors shouldn’t panic, but they should be alert to the possibility of a crash.

item.title: Financial education: how to teach your children about money
item.description: Financial education was added to the national curriculum more than a decade ago, but it doesn’t seem to have done much good. It’s time to take back co...
